narrative:
Columbus City  city has 579,431 registered voters, with 63.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.4 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +8.1% D−R vs +18.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
